csharpCode: using UnityEngine; using UnityEditor; using UnityEditor.SceneManagement; public class Script { public static string Main() { string result = ""; string[] scenes = {"Assets/Scenes/Level02.unity", "Assets/Scenes/Level03.unity", "Assets/Scenes/Level04.unity", "Assets/Scenes/Level05.unity"}; var sprite = AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<Sprite>("Assets/Textures/UI/bg.png"); if (sprite == null) { var importer = AssetImporter.GetAtPath("Assets/Textures/UI/bg.png") as TextureImporter; if (importer != null) { importer.textureType = TextureImporterType.Sprite; importer.spriteImportMode = SpriteImportMode.Single; importer.SaveAndReimport(); } sprite = AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<Sprite>("Assets/Textures/UI/bg.png"); } if (sprite == null) return "Cannot load bg sprite"; foreach (var scenePath in scenes) { var scene = EditorSceneManager.OpenScene(scenePath); var roots = scene.GetRootGameObjects(); foreach (var go in roots) { if (go.name == "Background") { var sr = go.GetComponent<SpriteRenderer>(); if (sr != null) { sr.sprite = sprite; sr.sortingOrder = -100; EditorUtility.SetDirty(go); result += scenePath.Replace("Assets/Scenes/","") + " fixed | "; } } } EditorSceneManager.SaveScene(scene); } var lsSprite = AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<Sprite>("Assets/Textures/UI/bg2.png"); if (lsSprite == null) { var imp2 = AssetImporter.GetAtPath("Assets/Textures/UI/bg2.png") as TextureImporter; if (imp2 != null) { imp2.textureType = TextureImporterType.Sprite; imp2.spriteImportMode = SpriteImportMode.Single; imp2.SaveAndReimport(); } lsSprite = AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<Sprite>("Assets/Textures/UI/bg2.png"); } if (lsSprite != null) { var lsScene = EditorSceneManager.OpenScene("Assets/Scenes/LevelSelect.unity"); var lsRoots = lsScene.GetRootGameObjects(); foreach (var go in lsRoots) { foreach (Transform child in go.transform) { if (child.name == "Background") { var sr = child.GetComponent<SpriteRenderer>(); if (sr != null && sr.sprite == null) { sr.sprite = lsSprite; sr.sortingOrder = -100; EditorUtility.SetDirty(child.gameObject); result += "LevelSelect bg fixed | "; } else if (sr != null) { result += "LevelSelect bg already has sprite | "; } } } } EditorSceneManager.SaveScene(lsScene); } EditorSceneManager.OpenScene("Assets/Scenes/Level01.unity"); return result; } }
